name: mcp-project-context
description: Enhanced MCP server for persistent project context with safety guards, checkpoints, channels, file-change tracking, token-aware responses, and Codex+Claude setup documentation.

tasks.title: Run full TypeScript build verification on local machine
tasks.description: Validate compile/test on host environment since sandbox had intermittent tsc Signal 6 issues.

tasks.title: Add restore/delete safety tests
tasks.description: Add focused tests for safeMode/force guard behavior across end_session and checkpoint tools.

tasks.title: Evaluate project-scoped Codex MCP registration when available
tasks.description: Track Codex CLI updates and switch docs/commands from global to project scope when supported.

tasks.title: Implement high/medium ROI feature set and docs
tasks.description: Ship checkpoints, safety guards, channels, file cache, token limiting, tool profiles, and cross-client docs for Claude + Codex.

decisions.decision: Run the server via a Node 22 launcher script (`scripts/run-mcp.sh`) using nvm rather than relying on global Node 25.
decisions.reasoning: TypeScript/tsx runtime behavior was unstable under Node 25 in this environment, while Node 22 is compatible and keeps system defaults untouched.
decisions.impact: Reliable local startup for Claude/Codex while preserving existing system Node configuration.

decisions.decision: Apply explicit confirmation guards (`safeMode` + `force`) to destructive or state-altering tools.
decisions.reasoning: Checkpoint restore/delete and session finalization should be protected from accidental invocation in agentic workflows.
decisions.impact: Safer operations and clearer human-in-the-loop control semantics.

decisions.decision: Introduce tool profiles (`minimal`, `standard`, `full`) and profile helper tools (`tool_profile_status`, `set_tool_profile`, `tool_profile_snippets`).
decisions.reasoning: Reducing exposed tool count lowers context overhead and helps tailor capability surfaces per workflow.
decisions.impact: Better model focus, easier profile switching, and improved operator visibility into active tools.

decisions.decision: Register this MCP server in Codex global MCP configuration using `codex mcp add` and the local launcher script.
decisions.reasoning: Current Codex MCP management is global; project-scoped registration is documented as future behavior.
decisions.impact: Immediate Codex usability with reproducible command and verification steps in docs.

notes.content: Implemented high-ROI enhancements: persisted end_session updates, checkpoint create/list/restore/latest/delete flow, and advanced get_project_context filtering (section/channel/category/status/priority/date/sort/pagination/regex).
Implemented medium-ROI enhancements: channel-aware tasks/notes/decisions/sessions with list_channels, git-derived channel support for start_session, and file hash caching with file_changed detection.
Added token-aware response truncation to get_project_context using environment variables MCP_MAX_TOKENS, MCP_TOKEN_SAFETY_BUFFER, and MCP_CHARS_PER_TOKEN.

README now includes comprehensive enhancement coverage (high + medium ROI), Claude setup, Codex setup, profile/token env config, safety semantics, and post-install verification checklist; added scripts/smoke-checklist.md for quick validation.

Verified Codex integration: `codex mcp add` registration succeeded and `codex mcp list/get` showed correct command; live launcher probe emitted 'MCP Project Context Server connected and listening' outside sandbox.
